title: Kannodu Kannodu Lyrics Mupparimanam
stanzas:
Kannodu Kannodu
kalandhu vitten
unnodu unnodu
tholaindhu vitten
vinnodu vinnodu
parandhu vitten

neethaane o ho..
en thaedal o ho..

un aasai un paarvai
un maeni un settai
un konjal naan paarthu
yedho aaneney

unnai vittaal nenjukkule
onnu thonaamal
iththanai naal kaathirundhen
unnai kaanaamal

thulli thulli oadukindra
pillai kandeney
thoondil kannaal ayyo
indru maatikondene

vanna vennilaa adhu
vandhu ponathaal
thookkam kannile adhu
thooram ponadhe

thanneer sirpamaai
unnai kandeney
thalli nindre thaan
naan thaagam kondeney

un aasai un paarvai
un maeni un settai
un konjal naan paarthu
yedho aaneney

otrai kaalil paandi
aadum pattaampoochiye
ennai endrum vazha
vaikkum undhan moochile

saavi illaamal aadum
bommai nee.
thalli sendraalum en
thaayin anmai nee

mottai maadi mael
vatta vennilae
unnai kandaalo
vaanai vittu oadaatho

en veetu jannal mel
un kaatru pattaale
thee kooda thiththikkum
poove unnaale.

Kannodu Kannodu
kalandhu vitten
unnodu unnodu
tholaindhu vitten
vinnodu vinnodu
parandhu vitten

neethaane o ho..
en thaedal o ho..

un aasai un paarvai
un maeni un settai
un konjal naan paarthu
yedho aaneney..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannodu Kannodu?

The song revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

Who composed the music for Mupparimanam?

The music for Mupparimanam was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

Who is the singer of Kannodu Kannodu?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash.

What is the release year of the movie Mupparimanam?

The movie Mupparimanam was released in 2017.

What emotions does Kannodu Kannodu evoke?

The song evokes emotions of romance, nostalgia, and a soothing sense of love.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Mupparimanam, the song Kannodu Kannodu beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Sathya Prakash, the melody is a soothing expression of romantic emotions, enhanced by Kabilan's heartfelt lyrics. GV Prakash Kumar's composition adds a soulful depth, making it a perfect track for moments of reflection and affection. The song conveys a sense of yearning and connection, resonating with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kannodu Kannodu from the movie Mupparimanam, where GV Prakash Kumar's soulful composition meets Sathya Prakash's captivating voice. This romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the lyrical magic penned by Kabilan and let the music transport you to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: I merged with your eyes, got lost with you, and flew with the sky.
The love scene captured by my eyes.
Your desire, your look, your body, your style, your teasing made me feel something.
Without you, I felt nothing in my heart, waiting all this time without seeing you.
I saw a child running and playing, and today I got caught in the swing of your eyes.
The colorful moon came and went, and sleep went far from my eyes.
I saw you like a water sculpture, standing far away, and I felt thirsty.
Your desire, your look, your body, your style, your teasing made me feel something.
I saw you in a school uniform, and learned the lesson of love through my eyes.
The butterfly dancing on one leg, your breath keeps me alive forever.
You are a doll dancing without a key. Even if you go away, you are like my mother's kindness.
On the terrace, I saw the round moon. If I see you, won't the sky run away?
When the wind from your direction touches my window, even fire tastes sweet because of you.
I merged with your eyes, got lost with you, and flew with the sky.
The love scene captured by my eyes.
Your desire, your look, your body, your style, your teasing made me feel something.
